  path={"/api/sync/treeAnchor"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Get the list of tree anchor nodes for a specified dataset and list of trees for synchronization

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"programId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"treeIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"TreeAnchorInput"}}},"description":"The tree anchor input","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}

>
